practice.task: Fix the bug: the program should find the maximum element in the array but crashes with an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException.
practice.title: Fix Array Max Bug
practice.bugExplanation: The loop condition uses <= instead of <, causing an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException on the last iteration.
